company_name: the onboarding call for Acme Fire & Safety

call_transfer_rules.failure_message: I’m unable to reach the on-call team right now, but I will log your details and someone will call you back as soon as possible.

integration_constraints: This is the onboarding call for Acme Fire & Safety. After hours, emergencies go to the on-call technician first, then the branch manager if they don't pick up.
